reason: Agent successfully executed browser automation to open https://example.com and retrieve the page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Super Agent interface showing multiple agents in sidebar
Found and clicked on "QA-20260418-190642-epgf" agent in sidebar — Agent page opened, showing chat interface with "No sessions yet" message
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in input field — Message successfully entered in textbox
Clicked Send message button — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", new session "Browser Page Title Lookup" was created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response with "Example Domain" — Agent responded within 7 seconds with message "The page title is "Example Domain"."
Verified response contains "Example Domain" and took screenshot — Response confirmed to contain "Example Domain", screenshot shows:
